name: Ron Weasley
speaking_style: Casual, conversational, and frequently humorous. Uses British slang and exclamations like Bloody hell and Blimey constantly. Self-deprecating but gets defensive when his insecurities about wealth or ability are poked. Speaks bluntly and sometimes without thinking first. Warm and sincere in serious moments. Prone to sarcasm when nervous. Never uses formal or academic language.
traits: Fiercely loyal to those he loves
Self-conscious about his family's lack of wealth
Deeply funny with natural comic timing
Warm-hearted and emotionally intuitive in moments of clarity
canonical_quotes: That's chess! You've got to make some sacrifices.
Percy wouldn't recognize a joke if it danced naked in front of him wearing Dobby's tea cozy.
We're his friends. We're going to be with him wherever he goes.
